submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import XGate
bloq = XGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native XGate from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Pauli-X is the standard bit-flip gate.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import ZGate
bloq = ZGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native ZGate from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Pauli-Z is the standard phase-flip gate diag(1,-1).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import Hadamard
bloq = Hadamard()
submissions.construction_method: Native Hadamard from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Creates equal superposition with relative phase.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import CNOT
bloq = CNOT()
submissions.construction_method: Native CNOT from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Control = first register (MSB), target = second.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import TwoBitSwap
bloq = TwoBitSwap()
submissions.construction_method: Native TwoBitSwap from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Exchanges two qubits.
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 4x4 permutation |ab>->|ba>. Swaps |01>(idx 1) and |10>(idx 2). Unitary verified.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import Toffoli
bloq = Toffoli()
submissions.construction_method: Native Toffoli from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Controls = first two registers (MSB), target = third.
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 8x8 identity except |110>(6)<->|111>(7) swapped. Unitary verified, shape (8,8).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=2)
submissions.construction_method: QFTTextBook(bitsize=2) from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book. Textbook QFT decomposition, no bit-reversal swaps.
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 4x4 with U[j,k]=(1/sqrt(4))*exp(2*pi*i*j*k/4). Matches DFT formula. Unitary verified.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=3)
submissions.construction_method: QFTTextBook(bitsize=3) from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book. Textbook QFT on 3 qubits, no bit-reversal.
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 8x8 with U[j,k]=(1/sqrt(8))*exp(2*pi*i*j*k/8). Matches DFT formula. Unitary verified.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import SGate
bloq = SGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native SGate from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. S = sqrt(Z), applies phase i to |1>.
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 2x2 diagonal [1, i]. Unitary verified.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import TGate
bloq = TGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native TGate from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. T = sqrt(S), applies phase exp(i*pi/4) to |1>.
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 2x2 diagonal [1, exp(i*pi/4)]. Unitary verified.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import CZ
bloq = CZ()
submissions.construction_method: Native CZ from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Controlled-Z: applies -1 phase iff both qubits are |1>. Symmetric in qubits.
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 4x4 diagonal [1,1,1,-1]. Verified diag matches definition.

submissions.bloq_code:
import cirq
from qualtran.cirq_interop import CirqGateAsBloq
bloq = CirqGateAsBloq(cirq.ISWAP)
submissions.construction_method: iSWAP has no native Qualtran bloq. Used cirq_interop.CirqGateAsBloq wrapping cirq.ISWAP, which swaps |01> and |10> with phase factor i.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import SGate
bloq = SGate().controlled()
submissions.construction_method: Controlled-S: applied .controlled() to native SGate. Control = first register (prepended by .controlled()), target = second. Applies S=diag(1,i) to target iff control=|1>.
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 4x4 diagonal [1,1,1,i] in big-endian. When control(q0)=1, target(q1) gets S: |10>(2)->|10>(2), |11>(3)->i|11>(3). Unitary verified.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import ZGate
bloq = ZGate().controlled().controlled()
submissions.construction_method: CCZ (doubly-controlled Z): chained two .controlled() calls on ZGate. First .controlled() gives CZ (2 qubits), second gives CCZ (3 qubits). Each .controlled() prepends a control register.
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 8x8 diagonal [1,1,1,1,1,1,1,-1]. Phase -1 only on |111>(7). Unitary verified.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=4)
submissions.construction_method: QFTTextBook(bitsize=4) from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book. Textbook QFT on 4 qubits, no bit-reversal swaps.
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 16x16. U[j,k]=(1/sqrt(16))*exp(2*pi*i*j*k/16) for j,k in 0..15. Matches DFT formula. Unitary verified.
